questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Does the patient have pain or iritis? (Yes/No)
Is the patient taking aspirin-containing products or NSAIDs? (Yes/No)
Is there suggestion of iritis (photophobia, deep ache, ciliary flush), evidence of lens capsule rupture, any protein (fibrin), or definitive white blood cells in anterior chamber? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's Intraocular Pressure (IOP) in mm Hg?
Does the patient have severe nausea or vomiting? (Yes/No)
Is there corneal stromal blood staining? (Yes/No)
Has the hyphema decreased to <50% by 8 days? (Yes/No)
Is the IOP > 60 mm Hg for > 48 hours despite maximal medical therapy? (Yes/No)
Is the IOP > 25 mm Hg with total hyphema for > 5 days? (Yes/No)
